records.ety: [F. pit; cf. It. piet; both fr. L. pietas piety, fr. pius pious. See Pious, and cf. Pity.]

defs: Veneration or reverence of the Supreme Being, and love of his character; loving obedience to the will of God, and earnest devotion to his service.
quotes: Piety is the only proper and adequate relief of decaying man.

defs: Duty; dutifulness; filial reverence and devotion; affectionate reverence and service shown toward parents, relatives, benefactors, country, etc.
quotes: Conferred upon me for the piety Which to my country I was judged to have shown.
